limitations: Fama and MacBeth (1973) approach: to ensure the robustness of our findings presented in the portfolio approach, we also use the multivariate Fama and MacBeth (1973) regressions to check whether news sentiment predicts future stock returns [Insert Table 11 Here] In sum, these results suggest that the future return of the GMB News portfolio is pronounced only at short time horizons and in firms with opaque information environments, thus providing supportive evidence for the mispricing view of return predictability
